description_long: A rustic round loaf of bread sits atop a circular wooden board, partially wrapped in a translucent parchment paper. The bread has a golden-brown, flour-dusted crust with deep, irregular scoring across the top, giving it a hand-crafted, artisanal appearance. The crust appears thick and slightly cracked, with a matte, rough finish and a few darker baked spots. The parchment paper is loosely wrapped, exposing much of the loaf and adding a casual, bakery-style presentation. The wooden board rests on a piece of weathered, splintered wood, suggesting a street market or outdoor setting. No visible branding or labeling is present, and the bread appears whole and unsliced.
description: A rustic, round, flour-dusted loaf of bread with deep scoring sits on a wooden board, partially wrapped in parchment paper. The crust is golden-brown, thick, and rough, with a hand-crafted look.
description_view_0: The loaf is seen from the side, showing the deep scoring on the crust and the parchment paper wrapping around the lower half, with the wooden board and weathered plank beneath.
description_view_1: A top-down view highlights the round shape, the flour-dusted surface, and the irregular scoring pattern, with the parchment paper forming a loose ring around the bread.
description_view_2: This angled view emphasizes the loaf's height and the way the parchment paper hugs the bread, with the wooden board and plank visible underneath.
description_view_3: The rear side of the loaf is shown, focusing on the thick, cracked crust and the way the parchment paper tucks under the bread, with the wooden base visible.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust features deep, irregular scoring lines and is heavily dusted with flour, giving it a rustic, artisanal appearance. The surface is thick, cracked, and uneven, with a matte, rough texture.
